name: rasberry-pi-media-server
description: Docker-based media server for Raspberry Pi with Overseerr, Radarr, torrenting and streaming capabilities

scripts.dev: echo 'Use Overseerr web UI at http://localhost:5055 for development'
scripts.start: docker compose down && docker compose up -d && npm run status
scripts.status: echo '\n🚀 Services Status:' && sleep 3 && docker compose ps && PI_IP=$(hostname -I | awk '{print $1}') && echo "\n📱 Access URLs (from another device use $PI_IP):" && echo "  Radarr:       http://$PI_IP:7878  (movies)" && echo "  Sonarr:       http://$PI_IP:8989  (TV shows)" && echo "  Jackett:      http://$PI_IP:9117  (indexers)" && echo "  qBittorrent:  http://$PI_IP:8080  (downloads)" && echo "  Plex:         http://$PI_IP:32400 (streaming)"
